name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-animpage
title: AnimPage Motion - Page Scroll Animations for Web Parts
shortDescription: This is a sample web part that illustrates how to use PnPjs, the IntersectionObserver API, and CSS animations to build a SharePoint Framework client-side web part that adds reveal-on-scroll animations to other web parts on a modern SharePoint page.
longDescription: This is a sample web part that illustrates how to use PnPjs, the IntersectionObserver API, and CSS animations to build a SharePoint Framework client-side web part that adds reveal-on-scroll animations to other web parts on a modern SharePoint page.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
